subtitle: Side-by-side risk profile analysis for two selected vendors.
errorBody: One or both vendor IDs may be invalid. Please check the IDs and try again.
radarSubtitle: Solid line = Vendor A. Dashed line = Vendor B. Values toward edge = higher deviation from sector norms.
noRadarData: No z-score data available for radar comparison.
metricSubtitle: The "Delta" column shows how Vendor B differs. Red = worse risk; green = better.

picker.hint: You can also navigate here from any vendor’s profile page using the “Compare” button.

verdict.title: Which vendor is riskier?
verdict.narrative: {{winner}} has a risk score {{pct}}% higher than {{loser}}
verdict.tiedMessage: Both vendors present similar risk profiles.

headline.title: Face to Face: Comparative Analysis
headline.subtitle: Select two vendors to reveal their differences in contracting patterns and risk
